name: Animals Habitat 500+ Kids Sticker Book by Cupkin Toddler Airplane Travel Activity Coloring and Sticker Book, Road Trip Essentials, 12 Coloring Pages + 12 Scenes for Ages 2–8 Years
bullets: WHAT'S INCLUDED?: Our Animal Habitats Sticker Book contains 500+ stickers to place on 12 unique scenes, and 12 coloring book pages all hand-drawn by our artists! Perfect for kids 3-5, the animal sticker book includes scenes and critters from around the world including sea creatures in the ocean, woodland animals in the forest, farm animals in a barn, and many more for boys and girls!

THE ORIGINAL LAY-FLAT STICKER BOOK: We created the side-by-side sticker pages & scenes with tiny hands in mind. The spiral binding allows for more time creating and less time flipping back and forth. Your kids will stay busy for hours crafting different scenes with these easy-to-peel stickers. Our spiral-bound sticker activity books are perfect for ages 2-4 and beyond!
PEEL, STICK, PLAY: Gently peel each sticker slowly to make sure they stay in one piece for tons of fun!

LEARN THROUGH PLAY: Kids build fine motor skills, explore spatial awareness, and strengthen hand-eye coordination as they peel and stick stickers onto colorful scenes! Engaging in conversations about the sticker book characters will help imaginations run wild & encourage make-believe and pretend that can foster bonds between you and your child. Go ahead - play on!

GIFTS FOR KIDS: The animal-loving child in your life will jump for joy when opening this gift! Grandparents love our Mom and Dad-approved learning activity books for boys and girls and all the entertainment they bring. Animal toy stickers are great rainy day activities and make the perfect gifts for birthdays, holidays, Montessori classrooms, and for animal enthusiasts ages 4-8.

reviews.name: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: High quality
reviews.body: Excellent. These are high quality coloring / sticker books that keep my grandkids busy for hours.

reviews.name: Queenof Hygiene
reviews.title: A wonderful sticker book for toddlers!
reviews.body: This sticker book has it all! Sturdy, a good size, and plenty of stickers and places to put them! The town scenes along with the matching stickers are very educational, but entertaining too, combining learning with fun! The spiral binding allows the book to lay perfectly flat, making playtime perfect for my toddler grandson! Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Tina Ramsey
reviews.title: Nice colorful “sticky” stickers and cute scenes
reviews.body: This brand has the cutest sticker books. I have purchased a few for both of my daughters (10/14 yrs old). Honestly you could get them for an adult (cat lover?!) and it would be a nice gift. These have a large variety of cute stickers and several pages of different “scenes” you can attach them to. The theory is that you can go back and rearrange/restock them more than once - according to my ten…

reviews.name: Vicki
reviews.title: Hours of fun with stickers
reviews.body: Good quality stickers that my two year old can easily remove and place herself. Having a place to put the stickers in book form makes this an activity she can manage in her own. A game changer for a busy mom.We have purchased several of these sticker books with different themes. Never disappointed.
